languages.text: "Моих людей не должны заботить лживые обвинения. Их забота — верно служить своему господину и не задумываться о том, чего они не ведают".
"My soldiers should not concern themselves with false accusations. Their concern is to serve their lord faithfully and not to speculate about things they do not understand."
languages.original_text: "Моих людей не должны заботить лживые обвинения. Их забота — верно служить своему господину и не задумываться о том, чего они не ведают".

traits.locale_text: "My soldiers should not concern themselves with false accusations. Their concern is to serve their lord faithfully and not to speculate about things they do not understand."
"My soldiers should not concern themselves with false accusations. Their concern is to serve their lord faithfully and not to speculate about things they do not understand."
"My soldiers should not concern themselves with false accusations. Their concern is to serve their lord faithfully and not to speculate about things they do not understand."

languages.text: “我的士兵不该理会那些不实指控。他们只需忠心事主，而不是妄自揣测自己根本不懂的事。”
languages.original_text: "My soldiers should not concern themselves with false accusations. Their concern is to serve their lord faithfully and not to speculate about things they do not understand."

traits.locale_text: “我的士兵不该理会那些不实指控。他们只需忠心事主，而不是妄自揣测自己根本不懂的事。”

languages.text: « Mes soldats n'ont pas à se préoccuper de ces fausses accusations. Leur devoir est de servir fidèlement leur seigneur, et non pas de perdre leur temps avec des choses qui les dépassent. »
languages.original_text: "My soldiers should not concern themselves with false accusations. Their concern is to serve their lord faithfully and not to speculate about things they do not understand."

traits.locale_text: « Mes soldats n'ont pas à se préoccuper de ces fausses accusations. Leur devoir est de servir fidèlement leur seigneur, et non pas de perdre leur temps avec des choses qui les dépassent. »

languages.text: "Askerlerim, asılsız suçlamalarla iştirak etmemeli. Onları ilgilendiren tek şey, efendilerine sadakatle hizmet etmek ve kafalarının basmadığı meselelerle ilgili varsayımlarda bulunmamaktır."
languages.original_text: "My soldiers should not concern themselves with false accusations. Their concern is to serve their lord faithfully and not to speculate about things they do not understand."

traits.locale_text: "Askerlerim, asılsız suçlamalarla iştirak etmemeli. Onları ilgilendiren tek şey, efendilerine sadakatle hizmet etmek ve kafalarının basmadığı meselelerle ilgili varsayımlarda bulunmamaktır."

languages.text: «Mis soldados no deberían preocuparse por falsas acusaciones, sino servir fielmente a su señor sin especular sobre cosas que no comprenden».
languages.original_text: "My soldiers should not concern themselves with false accusations. Their concern is to serve their lord faithfully and not to speculate about things they do not understand."

traits.locale_text: «Mis soldados no deberían preocuparse por falsas acusaciones, sino servir fielmente a su señor sin especular sobre cosas que no comprenden».

languages.text: "Meine Soldaten interessieren sich nicht für falsche Anschuldigungen. Ihre Aufgabe ist es, ihrem Lord treu zu dienen, anstatt sich über Dinge Gedanken zu machen, die sie nicht verstehen."
languages.original_text: "My soldiers should not concern themselves with false accusations. Their concern is to serve their lord faithfully and not to speculate about things they do not understand."

traits.locale_text: "Meine Soldaten interessieren sich nicht für falsche Anschuldigungen. Ihre Aufgabe ist es, ihrem Lord treu zu dienen, anstatt sich über Dinge Gedanken zu machen, die sie nicht verstehen."

languages.text: 「私の兵士たちは、虚偽の告発に心を奪われるべきではない。彼らの務めは、主君に忠実に仕えること、理解できないことに思いを巡らせることではない。」
languages.original_text: "My soldiers should not concern themselves with false accusations. Their concern is to serve their lord faithfully and not to speculate about things they do not understand."

traits.locale_text: 「私の兵士たちは、虚偽の告発に心を奪われるべきではない。彼らの務めは、主君に忠実に仕えること、理解できないことに思いを巡らせることではない。」
